Monthly billing is pay-as-you-go, annual billing requires 12-month commitment with 25% discount. AI features are included in all paid tiers with varying usage limits between Starter and Beyond plans.

Account-Based Retargeting tier has no initial fee. Ad credits are provided with certain packages.

key_features: Priority support (2 hour response time for 97% of requests)

notes: Pricing is based on maximum monthly ad spend in USD and is usage-based tier model. Specific price thresholds for each tier are not disclosed on the page - only that tiers exist based on ad spend levels. Page indicates pricing is automatically adjusted monthly based on actual ad spend. Six-month plans offer 10% discount, annual plans offer 15% discount. All tiers include unlimited users, accounts, and all features. Free trial duration extends from 30 to 45 to 60 days depending on tier.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: Monthly PPC reports, limited opportunity analysis, 1 SEO profile, 1 Web Metrics profile, 3 PPC alerts, 1 user seat

notes: Annual pricing offers 20% discount compared to monthly billing. The Gold tier annual price is $1,800 ($150/month equivalent). Silver annual is $700 ($58.33/month equivalent). AI feature (Ad Copy Optimiser for improving CTR and ad relevance) is mentioned in solutions but not explicitly tied to specific tiers. Enterprise pricing available upon contact.

tiers.name: Starter
key_features: Phone, email, and live chat customer support

notes: Unbounce offers a 14-day free trial with no credit card required. Annual billing provides a 25% discount. Enterprise tiers (Concierge and Agency) require contacting sales. AI features are included in Build tier (AI copywriting) and Optimize tier (AI traffic optimization). All plans include unlimited conversions, unlimited subdomains, 100+ templates, free hosting, and customer support.

Instapage does not display public pricing on their main pricing page. The page promotes a 14-day free trial and encourages users to 'Try for free' or 'Get a demo'. Specific pricing tiers, monthly/annual costs, and feature breakdowns are not publicly listed. Users must contact sales or request a demo for pricing information. AI content features are prominently mentioned as core platform capabilities but are not differentiated by pricing tier on this page.

Segment pricing is not publicly listed with specific prices. The page indicates 'Contact sales' for Customer Data Platform pricing. A 14-day free trial is available for Connections. AI features (Predictions and Generative AI) are included in CDP plans only. Protocols, Unify, and Engage are included in CDP or available as add-ons. Billing is based on Monthly Tracked Users (MTUs) with custom volumes.

mParticle uses value-based, consumption-based pricing with universal credits. No publicly listed pricing tiers - customers must contact sales for quotes. Pricing is based on pre-purchased credit volume with volume discounts. Credits can be used across any platform feature. No monthly event or user caps, no overages or penalties. AI features (Predictive Audiences and Predictive Attributes) are included in the platform without restrictions.

free_tier.name: Free
free_tier.limitations: 250,000 monthly events, limited to 5 JavaScript transformations, 1 tracking plan, 10 team members, 10 reverse ETL connections, community Slack support only

notes: RudderStack uses usage-based pricing model with monthly events as the pricing unit. Free plan includes 250,000 events/month. Starter tier is $220/month for 1 million events. Growth and Enterprise tiers require contacting sales for custom pricing. Overage fees apply on Starter plan calculated as difference between next tier pricing and current plan. Free plan data processing stops after second consecutive overage. All paid tiers include various levels of support and features. Profiles and Data Apps features available starting from Growth tier.
The provided raw text appears to be binary image data (PNG file header) rather than readable pricing page content. No pricing information could be extracted.

free_tier.name: Developer
free_tier.limitations: 2M credits per month, up to 10 domains, basic support, web-only identity stitching, 6 months data retention

notes: Lytics uses a credit-based pricing model where 1 credit = 1 profile update/event. Developer tier is free forever with 2M credits/month. Growth tier starts at $500/month for additional 10M credits. Enterprise tier requires contacting sales. Includes 10M free credits bonus when upgrading from Developer to paid tier. Pricing calculator available on page. Overages handled differently by tier: Developer throttled, Growth auto-enrolled in higher tier, Enterprise custom arrangement.

free_tier.name: Basic Reverse ETL
free_tier.limitations: Up to 2 active syncs, unlimited destination count, unlimited user seats

tiers.name: Agentic Marketing Platform

notes: Hightouch uses a usage-based pricing model with no specific pricing amounts displayed on the page. They offer a free tier (Basic Reverse ETL) with up to 2 active syncs. The Agentic Marketing Platform and Composable CDP tiers require contacting sales for pricing. No monthly or annual prices are specified - customers must request a demo or contact sales. The page emphasizes flexible, composable pricing where customers only pay for what they use, with no MTU limits or caps on sources, destinations, or user seats. AI features are prominently mentioned as part of the Agentic Marketing Platform offering.

free_tier.name: Free

tiers.name: Enterprise
key_features: Pick any cloud provider (GCP, AWS, Azure)

notes: Fivetran uses usage-based pricing with usage measured in Monthly Active Rows (MAR). Standard plan connections have a $5 base charge for usage between 1 MAR and 1M MAR. Pricing varies by connector type and usage volume with automatic discounts as usage increases. Annual contracts provide up to 22% savings. ELAs with fixed annual pricing are available. Free trial includes 14-day account trial plus 14-day trials for each new connection.
